profile.name: Sash Mohapatra
profile.bio: I am a technologist and entrepreneur bridging the gap between today's reality and tomorrow's possibilities. With a deep background in Microsoft Azure AI and a hands-on approach to building automated systems, I create media and learning ecosystems that decode the future. From the operational trenches of running Crazy Bubbles to the visionary heights of The Rift, I build what's next.

hero.headline: What we learn, unlocks potential, what we build, transforms us
hero.subheadline: Building The Rift, automating the mundane, and exploring the edges of AI.

projects.title: The Rift
projects.description: A future-tech media and learning ecosystem designed to help people navigate the rapidly changing landscape of technology.

projects.title: AIin30
projects.description: An intensive 30-day program demystifying Artificial Intelligence for professionals, featuring webinars and hands-on workshops.

projects.title: Pollzy
projects.description: Visuals and product direction for a new polling platform designed to capture real-time sentiment with high fidelity.

projects.title: Pulse Automation
projects.description: Automated pipeline for content aggregation and distribution, leveraging Make.com and custom scripts to streamline media operations.

projects.title: Nuro
projects.description: Explorations in neural interfaces and advanced AI agents.

projects.title: Crazy Bubbles
projects.description: Applying enterprise-grade automation and AI operational efficiencies to the real-world business of laundromats.

writing.title: The Age of Autonomous Agents
writing.summary: How agentic workflows are reshaping the way we build software and businesses.

writing.title: From Cloud to Edge: The Azure Journey
writing.summary: Reflections on a decade of cloud transformation and where the infrastructure is heading next.

writing.title: Why Laundromats Need AI
writing.summary: Unlocking operational efficiency in traditional brick-and-mortar businesses using modern tech stacks.

wrapped2025.title: The Rift Launch
wrapped2025.description: Officially launched The Rift as a premier destination for future-tech discourse.

wrapped2025.title: Webflow Migration
wrapped2025.description: Migrated core platform to Webflow + Memberstack for better scalability and user management.

wrapped2025.title: Pulse Pipeline
wrapped2025.description: Built and deployed the automated Pulse content pipeline using Make.com.

wrapped2025.title: AIin30 Program
wrapped2025.description: Created and ran the first cohort of the AIin30 learning program.

wrapped2025.title: Pollzy Visuals
wrapped2025.description: Defined visual identity and product direction for Pollzy.

wrapped2025.title: Replit Apps
wrapped2025.description: Experimented with rapid prototyping of internal tools using Replit.

wrapped2025.title: Founder Reflection
wrapped2025.description: Looking back on a year of building, automating, and teaching. The foundation is set for 2026.
